scoring_target: Assess whether the student identified and corrected preset errors, not whether the full passage is stylistically good.

dimensions.description: How completely the submission covers teacher preset errors.

bands.low: Two or more preset errors missed: 0-19.

dimensions.description: Whether rewrite accurately corrects the error without introducing a new error.

bands.high: Correction is accurate and high quality: 26-30.
bands.medium: Direction is correct but not precise enough: 16-25.
bands.low: Incorrect correction, off-topic, or introduces new errors: 0-15.

dimensions.description: Whether citation explains why the original text is wrong and what principle is correct.
Whether quote or selection_range pinpoints the wrong fragment precisely.

bands.low: Misaligned, overly broad, or wrong span: 0-4.

dimensions.description: Whether the submission avoids duplicates, invalid critiques, and fake errors.

forced_rules: Each student critique can match at most one preset_error.
Each preset_error can only be counted once, using the highest quality matching critique.
Extra invalid critiques do not add score and must be listed in invalid_critiques.
If citation is empty, reasoning_quality must not exceed 8.
